title: Orison Coverage Report v1
description: Static test-coverage estimate emitted by `ori coverage`. The estimator enumerates every public `function` or `query` symbol declared in implementation files (under <path>/src) and reports which of them are mentioned by name in at least one test file (under <path>/tests). Mention detection uses identifier-style word boundaries: the characters on either side of a match must be neither ASCII alphanumeric nor `_`, so `add` is not matched by `address` or `add_line`. Matching is case-sensitive. Lists are sorted by symbol id; per-function `tests_referencing` lists are sorted by file path. The `percent` field is computed as `100 * covered / total_functions` and is `0` when `total_functions` is `0`.

root.description: Filesystem root the report was computed against (typically the path passed to `ori coverage`).

total_functions.description: Number of public `function`/`query` symbols considered. Equal to `len(covered) + len(uncovered)`.

covered.description: Functions mentioned by at least one test file, sorted by id.

uncovered.description: Functions not mentioned by any test file, sorted by id.

percent.description: Coverage percentage: `100 * len(covered) / total_functions`, or `0` when `total_functions` is `0`.

name.description: Bare function name as it would appear in source.

kind.description: Symbol kind that produced this entry.

tests_referencing.description: Sorted list of test-file paths whose source mentions this function as a whole token. Empty when the function is uncovered.
